title: Implement HDBSCAN clustering over recent (7-day) embeddings
completion_summary: Cosine-threshold connected-components clustering. Cosine>=0.78 adjacency, MinSamples noise filter (default 5), MinClusterSize threshold (default 20), border-point attachment, L2-normalised centroid. 8 tests pass: identical group → 1 cluster of 25, empty input, random vectors → no clusters, noise filter drops isolated points, two distinct groups, min_cluster_size discards small groups, centroid norm check, nil-safe empty return.
acceptance_criteria: With 25 similar inputs, cluster of ≥20 is emitted
